data.body: Contributor identity configured: Gerrit account JoeOakhartNava (Joe Oakhart, id 1000007, GitHub OAuth). HTTP token stored in login keychain VIA git credential approve (helper-created item — the security-CLI route hangs on macOS partition-ID protection with no GUI; two earlier attempts timed out on the invisible dialog). gerrit remote pinned to https://JoeOakhartNava@.../a/rebar (deterministic lookup; bot entry coexists untouched). git ls-remote authenticates silently. Repo-local git identity set to Joe Oakhart <joeoakhart@navapbc.com> (the account's sole registered+preferred email) so Gerrit's committer-email check passes. NOTE: the token transited chat + transcript — regenerate in Gerrit UI at will and re-store via: printf credential lines | git credential approve.
